name: Joggin Ina Jug
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix equal parts of apple juice and grape juice in a quart or gallon jug.
2. Add 1 to 2 tablespoons of apple cider vinegar (some prefer less until they get used to the taste).
3. Optionally, add a cup of cranberry juice.
4. Stir well and store in a cool place.
This is an old Vermont remedy passed down by Dr. Jarvis, who promoted the benefits of apple cider vinegar. Some people mix 1 tablespoon of apple cider vinegar with room temperature water, then add 1 tablespoon of honey for improved energy levels over time.
